name: distillery
description: Knowledge base skills for Claude Code — capture, search, and synthesize project knowledge

jina_api_key.title: Jina API Key
jina_api_key.description: Jina AI embedding API key. Obtain from https://jina.ai/api-key/

github_client_id.title: GitHub Client ID
github_client_id.description: GitHub OAuth app client ID for team access. Create at Settings > Developer settings > OAuth Apps

github_client_secret.title: GitHub Client Secret
github_client_secret.description: GitHub OAuth app client secret for team access. Found alongside the client ID in your OAuth App settings

hooks.prompt: Call distillery_metrics with scope 'summary'. If there are pending_review entries, print a one-line reminder: '[Distillery] N entries pending review — run /classify to process them.' If there are no pending entries or the call fails, say nothing.

hooks.command: echo '[Distillery] If this session produced decisions or insights, run /distill to capture them in the knowledge base.'
